output: T3, T4, and T5 are complete. Frontend selection now derives shot metadata from `data.config.pinnedShotGroups`, preserves it when timeline and gallery selections are merged, and sends optional `shot_id`/`shot_name` fields to the agent. Backend normalization, persisted user-turn attachments, and continuation recovery now round-trip optional shot metadata, and timeline loading/summaries now carry explicit shot names through the shared `viewTimeline()` path so both loop-time prompts and runtime `run(command="view")` use the same shot-aware summary. The targeted frontend and edge Vitest modules passed, and the batch checkpoint was written.

task_updates.executor_notes: Frontend shot metadata now resolves from `useTimelineEditorData().data?.config.pinnedShotGroups` plus `useShots()`, not `resolvedConfig`. `AgentChat` preserves `shotId`/`shotName` when timeline and gallery selections share a URL, and `useSendMessage()` now includes optional `shot_id`/`shot_name` fields in `selected_clips` without changing legacy attachment behavior. Verified with the full `AgentChat.test.tsx` and `useAgentSession.test.tsx` modules.

Backend selected-clip normalization, persisted user-turn attachments, and continuation recovery now round-trip optional `shot_id`/`shot_name` and `shotId`/`shotName` fields. The changes are additive-only, and prompt enrichment still prefers explicit prompt metadata before DB-derived prompts, so explicit client-supplied shot fields are preserved untouched. Verified with the full `selectedClips.test.ts` and `loop.test.ts` modules.

Timeline state now batch-loads shot names from `shots` for pinned shot ids, threads them through `TimelineState`, `ToolContext`, and the `view_timeline` path, and uses the same shot-aware summary for both loop-time prompt construction and runtime `run(command="view")`. Clip lines now include shot context, and summaries include a `Shot groups:` section with resolved names or `shotId` fallback plus `shotId`, `trackId`, `clipIds`, and `mode`. Verified with the full `loop.test.ts` and `tools/timeline.test.ts` modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Timeline-selected media now resolves shot membership from `data?.config.pinnedShotGroups`, `AgentChat` preserves timeline shot metadata when deduping against gallery selections, and `useSendMessage()` serializes optional `shot_id`/`shot_name` fields in `selected_clips`.

Yes. `normalizeSelectedClips()`, `attachSelectedClips()`, and `recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns()` now round-trip optional shot metadata, and prompt enrichment still only backfills prompt text when the client did not already provide it, so explicit shot fields are not clobbered.

Yes. `loadTimelineState()` now loads shot names from `shots`, and the shared `viewTimeline()` summary adds shot annotations to clip lines plus a `Shot groups:` section with resolved shot label or `shotId` fallback, `shotId`, `trackId`, `clipIds`, and `mode`.
